flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Saint Norbert College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Saint Norbert College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (75.2% → 66.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Norbert College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
